allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: visible temporary seats with collision detection, reset table, and action-locking

- Add isTemporary/sourceOrderId fields to Seat schema for real DB-backed temp seats
- Collision-aware seat positioning: 36-candidate orbital algorithm picks largest gap
- RESET_TABLE action deletes all temp seats on a table \(table-based, not order-based\)
- Reset Table button appears when selected table has temp seats but no items
- Action-locking refs prevent double-tap races on handleAddSeat/handleTableTap
- Cleanup chaining: await temp seat cleanup before snapshot so new state is visible
- Heartbeat interval guard prevents nested intervals on re-render
- Temp seat cleanup on order close \(pay, close-tab, comp-void auto-cancel\)
- Temp seats render with dashed amber border, draggable in POS view
- Editor filters out temp seats so they don''t appear in layout editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: per-seat color coding and event-based item saves

Seat colors: each seat number gets a unique color \(8-color palette\) on the
floor plan, order panel badges, and group headers. Grey when empty, colored
when items are assigned — servers can visually match seats to items instantly.

Event-based saves: replace 5s autosave timer with immediate save-on-add.
Each item is persisted to DB the moment it''s added \(fire-and-forget\), with
a 30s safety net for crash recovery. Send-to-kitchen awaits all pending
saves before proceeding, eliminating the duplicate item race condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for id in cmlpplf1b002d6dp80kjyebfm cmlpplezp002b6dp8ybayo1uk cmlpplewh00296dp8o6vjxtua cmlppk7tc001p6dp8dh86nn9m)
